title: The Hindu Gains of Learning Act, 1930
full_text: The Hindu Gains of Learning Act, 1930 हिन्‍दू विद्याधन अधिनियम,1930 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193030 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1930-07-25 Act Year: 1930 Short Title: The Hindu Gains of Learning Act, 1930 Hindi Title: हिन्‍दू विद्याधन अधिनियम,1930 Long Title: An Act to remove doubt as to the rights of a member of a Hindu undivided family in property acquired by him by means of his learning. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Gains of learning not to be held, not to be separate property of acquirer merely for certain reasons. Section 4. Savings.
